sales.description:
CONSTANTINE VII with ROMANUS I and CHRISTOPHER, 913-959. AV Solidus (4.40 gms), Constantinople Mint, 924-931. NGC Ch AU, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 5/5.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
S-1745. Obverse: Christ Pantokrator seated facing on throne; Reverse: Crowned facing busts of Romanus I, wearing loros, and Christopher, wearing chlamys, holding between them a patriarchal cross. Extremely well centered and struck for issue, this near-Mint specimen provides an astou...
